'''fazongo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pycnidium|pycnidium]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-z-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pycnidium|pycnidium]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| fazongo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || fæzengeth || fæzengej || fæzengesh || fæzenge
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || fazozongoth || fazozongoj || fazozongosh || fazozongo
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || fazongoth || fazongoj || fazongosh || fazongo
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || fazofngofth || fazofngofj || fazofngofsh || fazofngof
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || fazongotho || fazongojo || fazongosho || fazongoko
|-
| [[Patient]] || fazongoth || fazongoj || fazongosh || fazongo
|-
| [[Possessive]] || fazongothol || fazongojol || fazongoshol || fazongokol
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || fazongoothotho || fazongoojojo || fazongooshosho || fazongooko
|-
| [[Dative]] || fazongothon || fazongojon || fazongoshon || fazongokon
|-
| [[Speaker]] || fazongothooro || fazongojooro || fazongoshooro || fazongokooro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
